name: SpotiFLAC
author: GhostWire

discovery.tagline: Import lossless music from Spotify, Tidal, Apple Music, Deezer & more.

description: Paste a Spotify, Tidal, Apple Music, Deezer, Qobuz or YouTube Music link and SpotiFLAC fetches it in lossless quality straight into your library — playlists, albums, artists and single tracks, queued in the background.
